textPreview: Vibe coding is not casual prompting at scale.

text: It is intent-driven software creation with roles, artifacts, and gates.

text: First skill: managing delegation, not building a swarm.

text: Role confusion — agent does too many things.
textPreview: Role confusion — agent does too many things.

text: Context loss — downstream agent never received upstream output.
textPreview: Context loss — downstream agent never received upstream output.

text: Tool overreach — agent calls tools it should not have.
textPreview: Tool overreach — agent calls tools it should not have.

text: No done criteria — agent never knows when to stop.
textPreview: No done criteria — agent never knows when to stop.

text: No escalation path — failure loops silently instead of surfacing.
textPreview: No escalation path — failure loops silently instead of surfacing.

text: MCP: a standard interface between agents and external tools.
textPreview: MCP: a standard interface between agents and external tools.

text: RAG gives context. MCP gives action. Policy decides.

text: Do not ask: does the model want this tool?
textPreview: Do not ask: does the model want this tool?

text: Ask: does policy allow this identity to use this tool for this data?
textPreview: Ask: does policy allow this identity to use this tool for this data?

text: Flow: Agent → ToolRequest → Policy Gate → MCP Server → ToolResult.
textPreview: Flow: Agent → ToolRequest → Policy Gate → MCP Server → ToolResult.

text: Threats: prompt injection, tool overreach, context leakage, stale permissions.
textPreview: Threats: prompt injection, tool overreach, context leakage, stale permissions.

text: The tool gateway is the bouncer.
textPreview: The tool gateway is the bouncer.

textPreview: Pydantic is the customs checkpoint: valid artifacts cross.

text: Validation errors become structured feedback for repair.
textPreview: Validation errors become structured feedback for repair.

text: Schema drift is silent. Pydantic makes it loud.
textPreview: Schema drift is silent. Pydantic makes it loud.

text: Use extra='forbid' to reject hallucinated fields.
textPreview: Use extra='forbid' to reject hallucinated fields.

text: Validate field lengths and constrain enums.
textPreview: Validate field lengths and constrain enums.

text: Reject unsafe file paths before they reach the filesystem.
textPreview: Reject unsafe file paths before they reach the filesystem.

text: Test valid inputs, invalid inputs, empty lists, extra fields, unsafe paths.
textPreview: Test valid inputs, invalid inputs, empty lists, extra fields, unsafe paths.

text: Test contracts as rigorously as code.
textPreview: Test contracts as rigorously as code.
